broadcastTemplates.label: P1 PACS Alert
broadcastTemplates.text: ⚠ P1 INCIDENT: PACS platform degraded — ZeroOps auto-remediation in progress. Radiology workflow may be impacted. ETA resolution: 20 min. Updates every 5 min.

broadcastTemplates.label: HL7 Gateway Alert
broadcastTemplates.text: ⚠ P1 INCIDENT: HL7 Gateway message queue backing up — patient admission flow impacted. ZeroOps investigating. Do not raise duplicate tickets.

broadcastTemplates.label: VNA Storage Warning
broadcastTemplates.text: ⚠ CAPACITY ALERT: DICOM archive approaching capacity limit. ZeroOps has raised emergency expansion request. Monitoring closely.

broadcastTemplates.label: All Clear
broadcastTemplates.text: ✅ RESOLVED: Platform restored — all systems operational. ZeroOps auto-resolved. Full RCA available in ServiceNow.
